Variables.Name: SkeletonGeneratedClass
Variables.Description:
Pointer to the skeleton class; this is regenerated any time a member variable or function is added but  
	is usually incomplete (no code or hidden autogenerated variables are added to it)

Variables.Name: GeneratedClass
Variables.Description: Pointer to the 'most recent' fully generated class

Variables.Name: bLegacyNeedToPurgeSkelRefs
Variables.Description: BackCompat:  Whether or not we need to purge references in this blueprint to the skeleton generated during compile-on-load

Variables.Name: bLegacyGeneratedClassIsAuthoritative
Variables.Description: BackCompat: Whether or not this blueprint's authoritative CDO data has been migrated from the SkeletonGeneratedClass CDO to the GeneratedClass CDO
